signals.headline: Trump Administration Implements Naval Blockade of Strait of Hormuz | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Administration Implements Naval Blockade of Strait of Hormuz | YES | HIGH confidence**

President Trump has begun a U.S. naval blockade aimed at curbing Iran's oil exports, increasing pressure on Tehran even as negotiations continue[1]. This blockade is now active, with at least four Iran-linked ships crossing the Strait on Tuesday despite the announced blockade[3].

signals.raw: Based on the latest search results, here are the key developments affecting prediction markets:

signals.headline: China Warns Against U
signals.raw:
China Warns Against U.S. Blockade, Asserts Right to Trade with Iran | YES | HIGH confidence**

China's Defense Minister has publicly condemned the blockade as "dangerous and irresponsible," warning that "The Strait of Hormuz is open to us" and asserting China's trade and energy agreements with Iran[3]. This signals potential geopolitical escalation and resistance to U.S. pressure.

signals.headline: South Korea's Annual Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's Annual Inflation Rises to 2.2% in March 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][3]

Bank of Korea's 7th consecutive interest rate freeze at 2.5% on April 10, 2026, explicitly cites March's 2.2% YoY inflation (up from 2.0% in Jan-Feb) as a key factor keeping rate cuts off the table amid energy volatility and won weakness[3]. signals.headline: Peace Talks May Resume by End of Week | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Peace Talks May Resume by End of Week | YES | MED confidence**

Delegates could return to Pakistan for another negotiation round as early as the end of this week, though no specific date has been confirmed[3]. The U.S. and Iran have exchanged competing proposals on nuclear suspensions (U.S. seeking 20 years; Iran proposing 5 years)[3].
